message:
feat(macros): implement sa_column full override support

Add SaColumnDef struct for complete SQLAlchemy Column specification
override, implementing bd-176.

The sa_column attribute provides full control over column definition:
- sql_type: SQL type override (e.g., "VARCHAR(50)")
- check: CHECK constraint expressions
- server_default: Server-side default value
- comment: Column comment
- nullable: Nullability override
- unique: Unique constraint
- index: Index creation

When sa_column is used, it replaces individual column attributes,
matching Python SQLModel's behavior where sa_column is mutually
exclusive with other sa_* parameters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
